/usr/bin/c++   -Wall  -Wextra  -Wshadow  -Wfloat-equal  -Wold-style-cast  -Wconversion  -Wformat=2  -Werror  -pedantic  -pedantic-errors  -fstrict-aliasing  -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-deprecated  -Wstrict-aliasing  -Wno-unused-variable CMakeFiles/locale_impermeability_test.dir/locale_impermeability_test.cc.o -o locale_impermeability_test  liboutput_test_helper.a ../src/libbenchmark_main.a ../src/libbenchmark.a -lrt
